pi_items.source: setup_task.sh PHP seed script explicitly injects 2 Boeing and 2 GE duplicates

privileged_info_summary: Verified that the data is synthetically generated via setup scripts. The setup explicitly introduces 4 duplicate accounts (2 Boeing, 2 GE) which respectively contain exactly 3 contacts, 2 opportunities, and 1 case that require reassignment to their canonical accounts. A distinct 'Johnson Controls International' account is also actively injected as a contamination record. The role-play metadata (CRM Administrator, Aerospace Manufacturing) aligns directly with the instructions.
